label: imports (X imports Y; importing module -> imported module)
gloss: Module X contains an import statement that resolves, within the pinned corpus, to module Y.
notes: Corpus-internal edges only: imports of modules outside the pinned corpus assert NOTHING (closed-world over asserted records). Structural (non-NSM) definition.

definition.definition: imports(X, Y), forward direction = importer -> imported. Module X contains an ast.Import or ast.ImportFrom statement naming a module that resolves, within the pinned corpus, to module Y (match by module name against the corpus's file set). An import of a module outside the pinned corpus asserts nothing.
